strengths: Extensive multi-language and multi-domain engineering experience (e.g., TypeScript, DLang, JavaScript, Node.js, Kubernetes)
Proven leadership in open-source and entrepreneurial projects (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
Strong background in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (e.g., MCP code generators at re:cinq)
concerns: Limited explicit AI-related academic credentials (no Master's/PhD in AI)
Current role at re:cinq is very recent (started April 2025), with unclear long-term impact
Primary expertise appears more aligned with full-stack/web development than AI strategy
response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong technical breadth and depth across cloud, software, and infrastructure engineering, with recent AI-agent work at re:cinq. However, his expertise leans more toward engineering execution than AI strategy or leadership, and his academic background lacks AI-specific credentials. The entrepreneurial projects (GISCollective) show innovation but not necessarily AI-focused differentiation.
